alternatives_compared.notes: Selection packet compares at least two alternatives or explicitly justifies one-option selection.

reversibility_labeled.notes: Decision notes whether it is reversible and what rollback/pivot means.

overall_notes: Deterministic local evaluation cites the linked stage proof artifact.

option_fairness.notes: Deterministic local evaluation cites the linked stage proof artifact.

tradeoff_clarity.notes: Deterministic local evaluation cites the linked stage proof artifact.
